debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
c : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩

failed_attempts:
by
                by_contra hmem
                have hb : (b, true) ∉
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_union, not_or] using hmem
                have : ¬ Error.eval n S
                    ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩
                    (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))) := by
                  unfold Error.eval
                  simp
                  refine ⟨S, ?_, ?_⟩
                  · refine ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩, ?_⟩
                    simp [Error.equiv, Error.OSequence.length, Error.OSequence.length_def, Error.roleOfIn_a]
                  · simp [Error.eval, Error.resultSet, Error.roleOfIn_a, hb]
                exact this a_knows_after_t

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) := by
                have : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                  simpa [stubbornness] using (stubbornness (n := n) (S := S) (a := c) (k := S b)
                    (σ := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) rfl).2 rfl
                exact Or.inr this
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [Error.eval] using this
              have hb' : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                simpa [Error.eval] using hb
              unfold Error.resultSet at hb'
              simp [Error.roleOfIn, Error.eval] at hb'
              rcases hb' with ⟨⟨hb_union, -⟩, -⟩
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_union

have hb : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
                  (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ := by
                have : (b, true) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                  have ht := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simp [Error.eval, Error.resultSet, ra] at ht
                  exact ht.1
                simpa [Set.mem_union] using this
              simpa [this] using hb

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                  (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S:=S) (σ:=⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a:=a)
                  (φ:=Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              simpa [eval] using hb

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have hb' : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                simpa [eval] using hb
              unfold resultSet at hb'
              simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at hb'
              rcases hb' with ⟨⟨hb' | hb', _⟩, _⟩
              · exact Or.inl hb'
              · exact Or.inr hb'

have hb_mem :
                  (b, S b) ∈
                      (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                        Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                have : (b, S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                  have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simpa [eval, this] using this
                simpa [resultSet, ra, Set.mem_union] using this
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_mem

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                simpa [eval] using (stubbornness (n := n) (S := S) (a := b) (k := S b) (σ := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) (m := (⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ : OSequence).length) rfl).2 rfl
              have : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                have : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                  exact Or.inl hb
                simpa using this
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using this

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                    Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                have : (b, S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ := by
                  simpa [resultSet, this] using (Set.mem_singleton (a := (c, S c)))
                exact Or.inr this
              exact (Set.mem_union.mp hb)

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have : (b, true) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                simpa [eval, resultSet, ra] using hb
              have hbS : (b, @S b) = (b, true) := by
                cases hsb : S b <;> simp at this
                · simp [this] at this
                · simp [hsb] at this
              have : (b, @S b) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                simpa [this] using (hbS ▸ this)
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using this

have hb' : (b, S b) ∈ S⌈⟨(⌜a c⌝ :: σ), o⟩⌉a := by
                have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have : (b, S b) ∈ S⌈⟨σ, ⁻o⟩⌉a ∪ S⌈⟨σ, ⁻o⟩⌉c := by
                simpa [resultSet, ra] using hb'
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using this
              ·
                sorry
              ·
                sorry

have hb_in_after : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Has b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              unfold resultSet at hb_in_after
              simp [ra] at hb_in_after
              rcases hb_in_after with ⟨⟨hb_in_union, _hb_not_refuse⟩, _hb_not_delete⟩
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_in_union

by
                have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                  have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                  simpa [Error.eval] using this
                simpa [Error.eval, Error.resultSet] using hb

by
                have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                  have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                  simpa [eval] using this
                unfold resultSet at hb
                simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hb
                rcases hb with ⟨⟨hb_union, _⟩, _⟩
                simpa using hb_union

have hb_in_call : (b, (b, true)) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                have hb_true : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (Has b (b, true)) := by
                  simpa [eval, this] using (stubbornness (S := S) (a := b) (k := true) (σ := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) (m := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩.length) rfl).2 this
                have hb_mem : (b, true) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by simpa [eval] using hb_true
                by_cases hba : b = a
                · left
                  simpa [hba] using hb_mem
                · by_cases hbc : b = c
                  · right
                    simpa [hbc] using hb_mem
                  · exfalso
                    have : equiv a (S, ⟨⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩, rfl⟩) (S, ⟨⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩, rfl⟩) :=
                      equiv_refl
                    have hk : eval S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (K a (Has b (b, true))) := a_knows_after_t
                    have hbS : eval S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Has b (b, true)) :=
                      true_of_knowldege hk
                    unfold resultSet at hbS
                    simp [roleOfIn, hba] at hbS
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_in_call

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S:=S) (σ:=⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a:=a) (φ:=Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have hbmem : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                simpa [eval] using hb
              have hbmem' :
                  (b, true) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ ∪
                        Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) := by
                simpa [resultSet, ra] using hbmem.1.1
              simpa [this] using hbmem'

have hb_true : Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                  (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval, resultSet, ra] using this
              simpa [eval] using hb_true

have hb_after : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∨ (b, S b) ∈ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                have hb_union : (b, S b) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) := by
                  have : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                    have : eval S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ (Has a (b, S b) ⟹ Has a (b, S b)) := by
                      simp [eval]
                    simpa using this
                  exact this
                simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_union
              simpa using hb_after

by
                have hb_in : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                  simpa [eval] using this
                unfold resultSet at hb_in
                simp [ra] at hb_in
                rcases hb_in with ⟨⟨hb_union, _hb_not_refuse⟩, _hb_not_delete⟩
                simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_union

have hb : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ := by
                simpa [resultSet] using (Set.mem_singleton (a := (c, S c)))
              right
              simpa [this] using hb

have hb_after : eval S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ (Has a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Has a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have hb_union : (b, true) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                simpa [resultSet, ra, eval] using hb_after
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_union

have hb_in : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Has b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval, this] using this
              unfold resultSet at hb_in
              simp [ra] at hb_in
              rcases hb_in with ⟨hb_in, -⟩
              rcases hb_in with hb_in | hb_in
              · exact Or.inl hb_in
              · exact Or.inr hb_in

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                  (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S:=S) (σ:=⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a:=a) (φ:=Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [Error.eval, Error.resultSet, ra] using this
              simpa [Error.eval] using hb

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∨ (b, S b) ∈ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                simp [eval] at h
                have : (b, true) ∈
                      ((resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) \
                          {⟨j, d⟩ |
                            eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (K a (Has j (j, !d)))}) := by
                  have : (b, true) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                    simpa [resultSet, ra] using h
                  simpa [resultSet, ra] using this
                have : (b, true) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) := by
                  exact (Set.mem_diff _ _).1 this |>.1
                simpa [Set.mem_union, this] using this
              simpa [this] using hb

have hb_in_after : (b, true) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩)
                  (a := a) (φ := Has b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              unfold resultSet at hb_in_after
              simp [ra] at hb_in_after
              rcases hb_in_after with ⟨hb_in_union, -⟩
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_in_union

have hb_or : (b, S b) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) := by
                have hb_self : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                  have : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ((b, S b) @ b) := by
                    simpa [eval, stubbornness]
                  simpa [eval] using this
                have hb_c_in : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                  cases hbc : b = c
                  · subst hbc
                    simpa using hb_self
                  · -- b ≠ c
                    -- if b ≠ c then b's own value is still only at b, but we can still use the union by putting it in the left side
                    have hb_a_in : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                      by_cases hab : b = a
                      · subst hab
                        simpa using hb_self
                      · -- b ≠ a: cannot show membership; instead use hb_self via union through c when c=b already handled; so use classical by_cases on c=b again
                        exfalso
                        exact (hbc rfl)
                    simpa [Set.mem_union] using Or.inl hb_a_in
                -- either c=b (handled) or otherwise we can still use hb_self by forcing b=a; but above exfalso closes, so only remaining is c=b
                simpa [Set.mem_union] using Or.inr hb_c_in
              -- since `refuse` is empty for (b, S b) by `a_knows_after_t` truthfulness, membership must come from union
              -- and thus from either side
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb_or

have hb_in_after : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a)
                  (φ := Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                simpa [eval] using this
              have hb_in_union :
                  (b, true) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                unfold resultSet at hb_in_after
                simp [ra, eval] at hb_in_after
                exact hb_in_after.1
              simpa [this] using hb_in_union

have hb : Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
                (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true) ⋁ Error.Form.Has n a (b, false)) := by
                have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a)
                  (φ := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                unfold Error.eval at this
                simp [Error.resultSet] at this
                exact Or.inl (Or.inl this)
              have hb' := (eval_dis (S := S) (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
                (φ1 := Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) (φ2 := Error.Form.Has n a (b, false))).1 hb
              rcases hb' with hb' | hb'
              · left; exact hb'
              · left; exact hb'

have hb' : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                  Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ := by
                have : (b, true) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                  have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a)
                    (φ := Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) a_knows_after_t
                  simpa [eval] using this
                unfold resultSet at this
                simp [ra] at this
                have : (b, true) ∈
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) := by
                  exact this.1.1
                exact this
              simpa [this] using hb'

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                simp [resultSet]
              have hknow : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (K a ((b, S b) @ b)) := by
                simpa [eval, hb] using a_knows_after_t
              have := true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) (a := a) (φ := ((b, S b) @ b)) hknow
              simpa [eval] using this

have hb : (b, S b) ∈ (resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ∪ resultSet c S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩) := by
                have : eval S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ (Has a (b, S b)) := by
                  have := true_of_knowldege (a := a) (S := S) (σ := ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) a_knows_after_t
                  simpa [this] using this
                simpa [eval, resultSet, ra] using this
              simpa [Set.mem_union] using hb

by
                by_contra hmem
                have hbtrue : (b, (true : Bool)) ∉
                    (Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∪
                      Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩) := by
                  simpa [Set.mem_union] using hmem
                have hbk : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.Has n a (b, true)) := by
                  have : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))) :=
                    a_knows_after_t
                  exact true_of_knowldege (S := S) (σ := ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩) (a := a) (φ := Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)) this
                unfold Error.eval at hbk
                unfold Error.resultSet at hbk
                simp [Error.roleOfIn_a, hbtrue] at hbk
